steps.t: Lush oxlip, horsetail, and vetchling can be found nearby Ereblen in north-western Ithilien. Ereblen has asked you to gather lush oxlip, horsetail, and…
Ereblen can be found to the west of Henneth Annûn. You have harvested many of Ithilien's flowers and herbs, and you should now return to Ereblen.
